---
id: drop-all-database-tables-and-views-clear-uploaded-images-and-destroy-the-session-admin-role-required
title: "Drop all database tables and views, clear uploaded images, and destroy the session (Admin role required)"
description: "This operation is irreversible. After reset the session is destroyed and default credentials (admin/changeme) apply."
sidebar_label: "Drop all database tables and views, clear uploaded images, and destroy the session (Admin role required)"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

info_path: api/private/churchcrm-private-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Drop all database tables and views, clear uploaded images, and destroy the session (Admin role required)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/database/reset"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This operation is irreversible. After reset the session is destroyed and default credentials (admin/changeme) apply.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
